Emily starts with [number_of_dogs] dogs at her rescue center. On [day_of_week], she received [number_of_puppies] puppies from [location]. The next day, [day_of_week], a family brought in [number_of_stray_dogs] stray dog they had found at [location]. These additions increased the total number of dogs in the center to [updated_total_dogs]. However, on [day_of_week], [number_of_families] families adopted [number_of_dogs_adopted] dogs each from the center. This adoption event significantly reduced the number of dogs in the rescue center.

***

After the adoptions, the number of dogs remaining at the rescue center is [final_number_of_dogs]. This number is calculated by starting with [initial_dog_count], adding [puppies_received], adding [stray_dogs_received], and then subtracting [total_adopted_dogs]. Emily now has [final_number_of_dogs] dogs in her care, and she is working hard to find new homes for the remaining animals at [rescue_center_name].
